## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/h1sErsy7BwAU94EZB6sZv5tEvU7VQosu?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Traffic Rebounding:** A 17-blog publishing push last week reversed a traffic dip; sessions are on track to double this week.](https://fathom.video/share/h1sErsy7BwAU94EZB6sZv5tEvU7VQosu?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [**Content Strategy Refined:** Features not yet live will be removed from blogs to prevent overpromising. This content will be updated later.](https://fathom.video/share/h1sErsy7BwAU94EZB6sZv5tEvU7VQosu?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
  - [**New Image Workflow:** An agentic image generator will create blog visuals. Kellie approved, trusting Matt's judgment to filter out low-quality outputs.](https://fathom.video/share/h1sErsy7BwAU94EZB6sZv5tEvU7VQosu?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [**FAQ Implementation Blocked:** Adding interactive FAQs to blog posts is blocked by Growth X's editor-level Webflow access. Matt will request creator access from Tavrn's CTO, Vitor.](https://fathom.video/share/h1sErsy7BwAU94EZB6sZv5tEvU7VQosu?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Cadence

  - [A 17-blog publishing push last week successfully reversed a recent traffic dip.](https://fathom.video/share/h1sErsy7BwAU94EZB6sZv5tEvU7VQosu?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [Sessions are on track to double this week, demonstrating the immediate impact of the content volume.](https://fathom.video/share/h1sErsy7BwAU94EZB6sZv5tEvU7VQosu?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [Top-performing articles include:](https://fathom.video/share/h1sErsy7BwAU94EZB6sZv5tEvU7VQosu?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
      - ["Medical Malpractice Caps" (case analysis)](https://fathom.video/share/h1sErsy7BwAU94EZB6sZv5tEvU7VQosu?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
      - ["AI Prompting for Lawyers" (feature-led)](https://fathom.video/share/h1sErsy7BwAU94EZB6sZv5tEvU7VQosu?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [The team will maintain a sustainable 5-blog/week cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/h1sErsy7BwAU94EZB6sZv5tEvU7VQosu?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)

### Content Quality & Accuracy

  - [Kellie flagged that some blog posts mention features not yet live, creating a risk of overpromising to potential customers.](https://fathom.video/share/h1sErsy7BwAU94EZB6sZv5tEvU7VQosu?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [**Decision:** Remove mentions of unreleased features.](https://fathom.video/share/h1sErsy7BwAU94EZB6sZv5tEvU7VQosu?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Prevents customer disappointment and improves demo conversion rates.](https://fathom.video/share/h1sErsy7BwAU94EZB6sZv5tEvU7VQosu?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
      - [**Action:** Matt will review the flagged article and remove the content.](https://fathom.video/share/h1sErsy7BwAU94EZB6sZv5tEvU7VQosu?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)
  - [**Context:** This issue stems from the AI workflow's "optimistic" output, not a flaw. Tavrn's future product documentation will resolve it.](https://fathom.video/share/h1sErsy7BwAU94EZB6sZv5tEvU7VQosu?tab=summary&timestamp=594.0)

### New Image Generation Workflow

  - [**Problem:** The team is running out of high-quality stock images for blogs.](https://fathom.video/share/h1sErsy7BwAU94EZB6sZv5tEvU7VQosu?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [**Solution:** Implement an agentic image generator to create custom visuals.](https://fathom.video/share/h1sErsy7BwAU94EZB6sZv5tEvU7VQosu?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [**Approval:** Kellie approved the new workflow, trusting Matt's judgment to filter out low-quality outputs (e.g., distorted figures).](https://fathom.video/share/h1sErsy7BwAU94EZB6sZv5tEvU7VQosu?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [**Rollout:** New images will appear in blogs starting this week.](https://fathom.video/share/h1sErsy7BwAU94EZB6sZv5tEvU7VQosu?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)

### FAQ Implementation

  - [**Goal:** Add interactive, expandable FAQ sections to blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/h1sErsy7BwAU94EZB6sZv5tEvU7VQosu?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Improves user experience and provides structured data for LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/h1sErsy7BwAU94EZB6sZv5tEvU7VQosu?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
  - [**Blocker:** Growth X's editor-level Webflow access prevents adding the required component.](https://fathom.video/share/h1sErsy7BwAU94EZB6sZv5tEvU7VQosu?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
  - [**Resolution:** Matt will request creator access from Tavrn's CTO, Vitor, via the shared channel.](https://fathom.video/share/h1sErsy7BwAU94EZB6sZv5tEvU7VQosu?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)

### Upcoming Content

  - [**This Week:**](https://fathom.video/share/h1sErsy7BwAU94EZB6sZv5tEvU7VQosu?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
      - [Continue building out "damage cap" content.](https://fathom.video/share/h1sErsy7BwAU94EZB6sZv5tEvU7VQosu?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
      - [Source new "case announcement" topics, prioritizing those with traffic potential.](https://fathom.video/share/h1sErsy7BwAU94EZB6sZv5tEvU7VQosu?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
  - [**Publishing Cadence:**](https://fathom.video/share/h1sErsy7BwAU94EZB6sZv5tEvU7VQosu?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
      - ["Damage cap" articles → publish directly.](https://fathom.video/share/h1sErsy7BwAU94EZB6sZv5tEvU7VQosu?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
      - [New "record review" & "medical request" articles → send for review.](https://fathom.video/share/h1sErsy7BwAU94EZB6sZv5tEvU7VQosu?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
      - [**Note:** If a content backlog occurs, Growth X has permission to publish "malpractice caps" and other proven article types directly.](https://fathom.video/share/h1sErsy7BwAU94EZB6sZv5tEvU7VQosu?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Matt:**](https://fathom.video/share/h1sErsy7BwAU94EZB6sZv5tEvU7VQosu?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
      - [Review the flagged article and remove mentions of unreleased features.](https://fathom.video/share/h1sErsy7BwAU94EZB6sZv5tEvU7VQosu?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)
      - [Request Webflow creator access from Vitor (CTO) via the shared channel.](https://fathom.video/share/h1sErsy7BwAU94EZB6sZv5tEvU7VQosu?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
      - [Publish "damage cap" articles directly.](https://fathom.video/share/h1sErsy7BwAU94EZB6sZv5tEvU7VQosu?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
      - [Send new "record review" & "medical request" articles for review.](https://fathom.video/share/h1sErsy7BwAU94EZB6sZv5tEvU7VQosu?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
      - [Share new "case announcement" topics for approval once sourced.](https://fathom.video/share/h1sErsy7BwAU94EZB6sZv5tEvU7VQosu?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
